properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is beyond the azure blue A God concealed from human sight He tinted skies with heavenly hue And framed the worlds with his great might

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: There is a God :/ /: He is alive :/ /: In Him we live :/ /: And we survive :/ /: From dust our God :/ /: Created man :/ /: He is our God :/ /: The great I am :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There was a long, long time ago A God whose voice the prophets heard He is the God that we should know Who speaks from his inspired word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Secure is life from mortal mind God holds the germ within His hand Though men may search, they cannot find For God alone does understand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our God whose son upon a tree A life was willing there to give That He from sin might set man free And evermore with him could live
